title: Falcon  - Custom Button - Teams Detected
scenario: Custom Button page shows "Other Providers" greyed out with message when Microsoft Teams is connected via Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Ensure a Poly Bluetooth audio device is paired and connected.
3. Open the Microsoft Teams app and establish a connection (sign in and connect audio).
4. Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app.
5. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings.
7. Observe the available options on the Custom Button page.
expected: The Custom Button page displays two options: 'Microsoft Teams' (selected by default) and 'Other Providers' (greyed out and inaccessible). A message is shown: 'Microsoft Teams is connected. Other Providers is not available when Microsoft Teams is connected.'
